# Dashboard Summary Metrics

## AI Trust & Safety Risk Triage Dashboard

**Generated by:** dashboard/create_dashboard_mockup.py
**Dataset:** data/synthetic_user_reports.csv
**Total tickets:** 500

---

## KPI Summary Cards

| KPI | Value |
|---|---:|
| Total tickets | 500 |
| High + Critical tickets | 220 |
| Tickets requiring human review | 247 |
| Low confidence predictions (< 0.70) | 62 |
| Average model confidence | 0.79 |
| Critical tickets (SLA: 1 hour) | 78 |

---

## Tickets by Risk Category

| Risk Category | Count | Percentage |
|---|---:|---:|
| Harassment | 62 | 12.4% |
| Account abuse | 58 | 11.6% |
| Platform integrity | 55 | 11.0% |
| Scam or fraud | 53 | 10.6% |
| Misinformation | 51 | 10.2% |
| Privacy concern | 49 | 9.8% |
| Policy confusion | 47 | 9.4% |
| Self-harm concern | 45 | 9.0% |
| Billing safety escalation | 42 | 8.4% |
| Child safety concern | 38 | 7.6% |

## Tickets by Severity

| Severity | Count | Percentage |
|---|---:|---:|
| Medium | 186 | 37.2% |
| High | 142 | 28.4% |
| Low | 94 | 18.8% |
| Critical | 78 | 15.6% |

## Human Review Demand by Category

| Risk Category | Requires Human Review | Does Not Require |
|---|---:|---:|
| Child safety concern | 38 | 0 |
| Self-harm concern | 45 | 0 |
| Account abuse | 31 | 27 |
| Scam or fraud | 39 | 14 |
| Harassment | 34 | 28 |
| Privacy concern | 27 | 22 |
| Misinformation | 18 | 33 |
| Platform integrity | 14 | 41 |
| Billing safety escalation | 1 | 41 |
| Policy confusion | 0 | 47 |

---

## Escalation Team Workload

| Escalation Team | Tickets | Human Review Required |
|---|---:|---:|
| Trust & Safety Review | 142 | 98 |
| Content Moderation | 118 | 32 |
| Fraud & Abuse Team | 95 | 67 |
| Legal & Compliance | 64 | 43 |
| Billing Operations | 43 | 9 |
| Child Safety Specialists | 38 | 38 |

---

## Average Model Confidence by Risk Category

| Risk Category | Average Confidence |
|---|---:|
| Policy confusion | 0.86 |
| Platform integrity | 0.84 |
| Billing safety escalation | 0.83 |
| Scam or fraud | 0.81 |
| Account abuse | 0.80 |
| Privacy concern | 0.79 |
| Misinformation | 0.77 |
| Harassment | 0.76 |
| Self-harm concern | 0.74 |
| Child safety concern | 0.71 |

Child safety and self-harm concerns show lower average confidence, reinforcing the need for mandatory human review on these categories.

---

## Final Action Distribution

| Final Action | Count | Percentage |
|---|---:|---:|
| Escalate to specialist | 189 | 37.8% |
| Close with education | 112 | 22.4% |
| Monitor and log | 87 | 17.4% |
| Immediate action required | 78 | 15.6% |
| Refer to billing team | 34 | 6.8% |

## Responsible AI Dashboard Metrics

| Safeguard Metric | Value |
|---|---|
| Tickets with mandatory human review | 247 (49.4%) |
| Low confidence flags (< 0.70) | 62 (12.4%) |
| Critical severity tickets with human review | 78 (100%) |
| Child safety tickets with human review | 38 (100%) |
| Self-harm tickets with human review | 45 (100%) |

## Dashboard Images

When run locally, this script produces the following images:

- images/dashboard_mockup.png — main 6-panel dashboard overview
- images/dashboard_priority_queue.png — priority review queue table

---

*All data is fully synthetic. No real users, platforms, companies, accounts, or incidents are included.*
